case_title: ATSUKO WILLIMAS VS. GREGORY HOWELL & ASSOCIATES, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIMAS, ATSUKO AS TO DEFENDANT GREGORY HOWELL & ASSOCIATES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, DBA GHA TRAVEL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
